name: mast
description: Clone repos, create per-repo virtualenvs, and install requirements.txt in each.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "if (Test-Path 'C:\MAST\repos') { Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\mast-smoke.txt') -Value 'mast_ok' } else { 'C:\MAST\repos not found' | Out-File (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\mast-verify.log'); exit 1 }"
